nasb.text: Thus you longed for the lewdness of your youth, when the Egyptians handled your bosom because of the breasts of your youth.

esv.text: Thus you longed for the lewdness of your youth, when the Egyptians handled your bosom and pressed your young breasts.”

cnv.text: 這樣，你就渴想你幼年時的淫蕩；那時，埃及人撫弄過你的乳房，撫摩你年幼時的胸。

ccb.text: 渴望重温早年的淫行，任埃及人摸胸弄乳。
